query:
SELECT
                c.id as entity_id,
                c.name,
                regexp_replace(
                    c.name,
                    $7,
                    '<macro_em>\1</macro_em>',
                    'gi'
                ) as name_highlighted,
                c."updatedAt" as updated_at
            FROM "Chat" c
            WHERE (c."userId" = $1 OR c.id = ANY($2))
                AND c."deletedAt" IS NULL
                AND c.name ILIKE $3
                AND (
                    $5::timestamptz IS NULL
                    OR (c."updatedAt", c.id) < ($5, $6)
                )
            ORDER BY c."updatedAt" DESC, c.id DESC
            LIMIT $4
